title.en: He'd tried it before, but he couldn't find any ...

content.en:
Ye Tian knew very well that he was slowly looking for the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal material, and it was impossible to obtain too many Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal ore in a short period of time.

He'd tried it before, but he couldn't find any Eater Crystal ore so far.

However, those Eternal Realm God Realm mid-level demon seeds or Eternal Realm God Realm high-level demon seeds definitely still have a lot of Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal ore and other materials on their bodies, and if they kill more, they can obtain a large amount of Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal substances.

That's why he's here this time.

"According to the previous information, there are occasional high-level demon seeds of the Eternal Realm God Realm coming in here, but those high-level demon seeds can't stay here often, and the possibility of encountering these high-level demon seeds is not high. Now there are still some Eternal Realm God Realm mid-level demon seeds here for a long time, kill these mid-level demon seeds first. "

Ye Tian decided.

Of course, once the mid-level demon seed loses a lot, the high-level demon seed will inevitably come in.

At that time, he could completely ambush a high-level demon seed, and at the cost of sacrificing his multiple replica bodies, there was an almost 100% chance that he would be able to kill a high-level demon seed.

If he succeeds, he will be able to leave the place immediately.

"That's it!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

Somewhere in the boundary rift.

Three Eternal Realm Divine Realm mid-level peak demon seeds are leading more than a dozen Eternal Realm 260 Divine Realm middle-level demon seeds and many Eternal Realm Divine Realm beginner demon seeds, and they are mining an ore vein, this ore vein is not the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal Ore Vein, but another ore vein-Heavenly Vein Demon Gold Vein!

This is a vein of Heavenly Vein Demon Gold that they just discovered!

Celestial Vein Demon Gold can be refined into weapons, and a huge Celestial Vein Demon Gold Ore can only extract a small amount of Celestial Vein Demon Gold, and only high-level demon species have enough strength to extract that certain amount of Celestial Vein Demon Gold Ore from the Celestial Vein Demon Gold Ore.

The weapons forged and refined by the Heavenly Vein Demon Gold are incomparably hard and indestructible.

In terms of weapon manufacturing, the Heavenly Vein Demon Gold is much higher than the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal substance.

It can be said that a Heavenly Vein Demon Gold Vein is enough to make even high-level demon seeds excited.

This time, they were also ordered to quickly mine this Heavenly Vein Demon Gold Vein, otherwise they would be discovered by the Realm Gods of the Realm Realm, and a big battle would inevitably break out.

"Hurry up, or the gods of the realm will find out here, and we will have to fight them!"

The Demon Seed at the peak of the Eternal Realm God Realm said.

"Madness, I'll go and check around, I have to be careful of those Realm Gods (BGAA), if I find those Realm Gods, I will notify you immediately!"

Another Eternal Realm God Realm mid-level peak demon seed Ping Tu said.

"Pingtu, be careful!"

Mad Xin said.

......

Wow!

Pingtu went to the neighborhood to scout and patrol the territory.

The years passed.

Some time passed.

Suddenly.

A terrifying force descended, and Pintu sensed it, but before he could resist, he was pierced by a spear through the Eternal Demon Seed.

This force was beyond his cognition, beyond his imagination.

"High Realm Divine !!"

It was his last thought before he died.

He never expected that a high-level realm god would even engage in assassination!

Wow!

Ye Tian appeared and scraped the material resources on the demon seed Pingtu.

"That's right, there are really a lot of Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal substances, hey, this is Tianmai Demon Gold Ore, and it's also a good thing!"

Ye Tian saw the Heavenly Vein Demon Gold.

He just lacked a top-notch weapon, although he had the Eternal Demon Pillar, the Chilin Ancient Spear, and some other Eternal Realm Treasure weapons in his hand, but it was enough for an ordinary Eternal Realm God Realm Intermediate Rank.

But for him, these weapons are average, and they are not worthy of his current combat effectiveness.

According to his understanding, those high-level realm gods and high-level demon seeds will be equipped with their own weapons.

And the Heavenly Vein Demon Gold is a weapon material suitable for the refining of high-level demon seeds, and it is also suitable for demon seeds, but it is not suitable for the Realm God, if the Realm God is holding the Heavenly Vein Demon Gold weapon, the Eternal Dao Seed will naturally be affected.

Moreover, if you really use the Heavenly Vein Demon Gold to refine it into a weapon, it can cover the aura of the Heavenly Vein Demon Gold, and it will not expose the existence of the Heavenly Vein Demon Gold.

"However, there are not many Heavenly Vein Demon Gold ores these days, and there are not many Heavenly Vein Demon Gold extracted, if you can get more Heavenly Vein Demon Gold, it would be good!"

Wow!

Ye Tian left here and continued to move forward.

Soon. []

He found a group of demon seeds, as well as the Heavenly Vein Demon Gold Vein.

"This is the Heavenly Vein Demon Gold Mine, no wonder that the demon seed just now has those Heavenly Vein Demon Gold Ore, it seems that this group of demon seeds is mining the Heavenly Vein Demon Gold!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He didn't do it immediately, but withdrew, and began to condense more copy bodies, and he was ready to take down these demon seeds and the Heavenly Vein Demon Gold directly.

Not long after, Ye Tian's six replica bodies appeared here.

But he still didn't do it, he waited for these demon seeds to mine the Heavenly Vein Demon Gold almost before he did it, so that he could save his time mining the Heavenly Vein Demon Gold.

Otherwise, if you really do it yourself, if a high-level demon seed comes here, you won't have time to slowly collect the Heavenly Vein Demon Gold Ore!

Some time passed.

It seems that the demon seed Pingtu has not been heard, and these demon seeds are starting to become suspicious.

As a result, several species began to come out to investigate the situation.

"Can't wait, just do it!"

Ye Tian crossed the void, killed this demon seed in an instant, and then surrounded this group of demon seeds.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian made a brazen move, and the Ruin Sun Realm shrouded this area.

Immediately, he cast a perfect-level Eternal Realm Spiritual Technique to kill them.

These demon seeds were also resisting, but even the Eternal Realm Divine Realm mid-level peak demon seeds like Demon Seed Madness were like ants in Ye Tian's hands.

Puff puff puff!!!!

In a short period of time, these demon seeds were killed by Ye Tian.

Then, Ye Tian looted all the resources and treasures on their bodies.

"So much Tianmai Demon Gold Ore, I've made a lot of money!"

Ye Tian was excited.

Then, he mined the Heavenly Vein Demon Gold ore himself, striving to mine as much as he could.

"Almost, a replica body has to be withdrawn with these resources!"

Wow!

A copy of Ye Tian's body left with these resource treasures, and soon it was cracked out of this realm and returned to the Terran Holy Kingdom.

And here he waits for the high-level demon seed to appear, so as to ambush the high-level demon seed.

If he's lucky, there's a high chance that he can successfully ambush him, unless it's a special situation where two high-level demon seeds come together, then there's no way.
